description: Proof-of-concept for EXPLORE mode: three independently receipted systems connected to reveal unnamed architectural pattern

input_receipts.mechanism: Independent tool-count check gates verdict transition
Independent behavioral eval gates asset promotion and routing

synthesis_output.core_distinction: Gate is recomputation (produce ground truth independently, compare), NOT evaluation (look at the work, judge it). Evaluation is bypassable; recomputation is not.
synthesis_output.biological_grounding: Cell cycle checkpoint pattern — G1/S, G2/M, spindle assembly. ATM/ATR kinases directly check DNA integrity, not the cell's intention to divide. Same structural primitive evolved independently for same failure mode.
layers_identified: Data layer: receipts as recomputable claims (hash verification)
Workflow layer: PLAN → verify → EXECUTE with kill conditions
Architecture layer: hxq-solana, MorphSAT, specialist compute pool
Memory layer: codon SSM as audit-readable state (recomputable from event stream)
synthesis_output.counterexample_search: No clean counterexample found across stack. helix-substrate hash-checks (recomputation), Pat's helix-kv match=true (recomputation), born-compressed training (independent re-eval), PR #21412 Wasserstein (independent recomputation by Zyphra).
predictions: Next instance will be reasoning-chain recomputation (second agent, same inputs, gate on agreement)
Most current AI safety work is review-style, not recomputation-style — this is a testable claim
synthesis_output.leap_strength: STRONG — multiple receipts support, structural analogy holds, falsifiable predictions

template_verdict: PASS — exercise produced named pattern, biological grounding, unifying frame across 4 layers, falsifiable predictions, and a reframe of receipt discipline as architecture. None present in individual findings. All follow from combination.
